understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the character to the goal gem tile marked '+', while avoiding spike tiles and other hazards. Each level needed to be completed to progress, and the main objective was to reach the end of the current BP35 level and eventually win the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed by issuing actions such as MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT, resulting in the character shifting one tile in the specified direction. Gravity caused the character to fall in the current gravity direction each turn unless obstructed. Clicking could refer to interacting with switches or mechanisms in some levels. Hazards, such as spike tiles, resulted in instant failure if landed on. Undo was not specifically used or shown in this run, but it likely allows for reversing previous moves. Each attempt at a level had a fixed limit of 50 turns, and only two attempts were given per level. Failure resulted in the level restarting, with context about previous failures provided.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate the character to the goal gem tile marked '+', while avoiding spike tiles and other hazards. Each level needed to be completed to progress, and the main objective was to reach the end of the current BP35 level and eventually win the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed by issuing actions such as MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT, resulting in the character shifting one tile in the specified direction. Gravity caused the character to fall in the current gravity direction each turn unless obstructed. Clicking could refer to interacting with switches or mechanisms in some levels. Hazards, such as spike tiles, resulted in instant failure if landed on. Undo was not specifically used or shown in this run, but it likely allows for reversing previous moves. Each attempt at a level had a fixed limit of 50 turns, and only two attempts were given per level. Failure resulted in the level restarting, with context about previous failures provided.
